description_long: This lamp features a bell-shaped shade with an intricately textured and ornate surface, reminiscent of vintage or Victorian-era metalwork. The exterior is dark, with a metallic sheen and a pattern of raised, leafy or floral motifs that cover the entire shade. The top of the lamp has a smooth, slightly flared collar that likely serves as the mounting or attachment point. The lower edge of the shade is scalloped, adding to its decorative appeal and giving it a delicate, lace-like appearance. The lamp appears to be made primarily of metal, possibly cast iron or bronze, with a dark, glossy finish. Its design suggests it is intended for overhead mounting, such as on a ceiling, and would cast intricate shadows when illuminated.
description: A dark, ornate bell-shaped lamp shade with intricate raised floral patterns and a scalloped edge, finished in a glossy metallic sheen.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed floral pattern and scalloped lower edge, with the smooth collar at the top clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the depth of the ornate texture and the shadowing within the raised motifs, with the collar slightly angled.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the symmetrical bell shape and the consistent decorative pattern around the shade.
description_view_3: Back view reveals the continuation of the intricate design and the uniformity of the scalloped edge.
